commits.content:
npm i -D nodemon ----> 

"devDependencies": {
    "nodemon": "^3.1.14"
  }


nodemon is used - no need to restart server agian agian 


Prettier = automatic code cleaner - config 
..............................................................
🛠️ Development (Dev)

This is the phase where you build and test your app


....................................................................

🚀 Production (Prod)

This is the final version users use
Your deployed site on Vercel or Netlify
................................................................
🔹 What Express does (in simple terms)

It helps you:

Create a server
Handle HTTP requests (GET, POST, PUT, DELETE)
Build APIs
Manage routes (URLs)
Send responses to users (data, HTML, JSON)
